MAP.COMMENT: === Conversion EFW Asset Condition to GLD Asset Condition ===

BRANCH.COMMENT: Set the Asset status value to N or U

SEQUENCE.NAME: %assetCondition%=0
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If the EFW value is 0, then GLD needs 'N'

SEQUENCE.NAME: %assetCondition%=1
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If the EFW value is 1, then GLD needs 'U'

MAP.COMMENT: Use Business Address for Asset Location

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Get the Quantity to save later as a CustomField

MAP.COMMENT: Map the current Quantity and IntegrationCode
Set the cost of the first asset to be the requested amount
